audit_items.proof_trace: The sole function in detach.c, lutil_detach, contains no variable pointer dereferences: all pointer-typed arguments to syscalls are compile-time string literals (inherently non-NULL) or NULL passed as an ioctl data argument (standard POSIX usage, not locally dereferenced). Function parameters are integers (int debug, int do_close), and there are no struct field accesses, *ptr patterns, or pointer arithmetic. The property holds trivially.
